examples: The infection of citrus virus and viroid diseases on Bendizao and its mutant new Ben No. 1 was studied in Huangyan, Zhejiang during 1989~1996.
Potato spindle tuber viroid (PSTV) in different parts of tubers of potato CV. "Tiger Head" was determined, by return electrophoresis with silver staining.
The information replication of PSTV RNA not only refers to the theo refical problem of the molecular biology of PSTV RNA, but also the molecular basis of controlling viroid diseases.
